scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../license-server && npm install
scripts.ci:build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.e2e:ui:smoke: cd frontend && npm run test:e2e -- tests/ui-simple.spec.ts
scripts.e2e:api:smoke: cd frontend && npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e.spec.ts --grep "API can upload a document and create sign request"
scripts.e2e:smoke: npm run e2e:auth && npm run e2e:workflow
